ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the test case */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria or description of the test case */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., web_have_elements, web_have_styles) */,
  "input_params" TEXT /* Input parameters for the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the test case */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the test case execution */,
  "passed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the test case that passed */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test case execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was last updated */,
  "test_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the test case */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the test case is executed */,
  "test_script_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the script used for the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test case */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "execution_frequency" TEXT /* How often the test case is executed (e.g., daily, weekly, on-demand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the test category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for testing */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used for testing */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the environment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test script */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the test script */,
  "script_content" TEXT /* Content of the test script */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the script was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the script was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the script */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the script */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the script (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the script (e.g., JavaScript, Python) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scripts_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scripts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the test case execution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who executed the test case */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* Environment where the test case was executed */,
  "test_script_id" INTEGER /* Script used for the test case execution */,
  "test_case_version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the test case that was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_version_id") REFERENCES test_case_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., QA engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the account */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a test case */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test case */,
  "version_content" TEXT /* Content of the test case version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the log entry */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* Environment where the log entry was generated */,
  "test_script_id" INTEGER /* Script used for the log entry */,
  "test_case_version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the test case that generated the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_case_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_version_id") REFERENCES test_case_versions ("version_id")
)
